what: COMPREHENSIVE Product B across the full 8-kernel active curriculum, post round-trip-fix (commit 664a9524; the persistent/T2 lever now injects correctly into gen0). Time-first deliverable. Seeded vs unseeded quick-autotune convergence, N=3 pinned seeds {0,1,2}, cold cache per run, full max_generations=5.
env: H100/sm_90 fp32; GPU2 (Group A) + GPU3 (Group B) in parallel, one autotune run per GPU (never two timing runs on one GPU). Default LFBOTreeSearch quick profile (init_pop 30, copies 2, max_gen 5). HELION_FORCE_AUTOTUNE=1, NOT HELION_SKIP_CACHE. seeded = registered triton_reduction_tile heuristic; unseeded = HELION_DISABLE_AUTOTUNER_HEURISTICS=1.

long_sum: (256,131072) T1 persistent w32 (M lifted 8->256 per brief; still near noise floor)
sum: (2048,16384) T1 persistent w16 (Product-A wash; included as 1 honest shape)

seed_injection_verification.method: Each seeded .driver.log prints SEED-FLAT-ENCODE (raw lever -> flat-normalized lever after the autotuner flatten/unflatten round-trip). Plus an independent gen0-CSV cross-check: the expected seed config (lever-matched on block_sizes/reduction_loops/num_warps/num_stages) must appear in gen0 of the seeded CSV.
seed_injection_verification.result: PROVEN. 27/27 seeded runs: lever PRESERVED (0 DEGRADED). 27/27 seeded runs: seed config present in gen0 (lever-matched). 27/27 unseeded runs: n_seeds=0, heuristics=[]. T1 persistent reduction_loops=[None] and T1 looped[16384] and T2 block_sizes both round-trip intact post-fix.

gen0_seed_quality_advantage._metric: median(unseeded gen0 best) / median(seeded gen0 best) across 3 seeds. The most direct measure of the injected seed's perf quality.

slice1_same_budget_seeded_advantage._metric: unseeded_ms / seeded_ms at budget (>1 => seeded faster), median of 3 seeds.
slice1_same_budget_seeded_advantage.guardrail: ALL PASS (gen5 seeded-advantage >= 1-eps with eps=0.03). Worst = rms_norm 0.997/0.998 -- within fp32 do_bench ~2% noise; both modes converge to the same optimum at full budget. softmax_two_pass uniquely keeps a 1.45x edge even at full budget because the unseeded LFBO struggles to discover the persistent config within 5 generations.

slice2_time_to_target_HEADLINE._metric: wall-clock (s) to first reach 95% of unseeded-full-budget perf; speedup = unseeded_t / seeded_t (>1 => seeded reaches target sooner). median[min,max] of 3 seeds. target_pct=95 is the robust headline; 98% is reported but tighter targets favor the longer unseeded-vs-seeded full search and flip on shapes that converge to ~identical optima.

cross_entropy(8192,65536).note: huge 95% win; 98% flips because seeded full search runs longer (95s vs 73.5s total) -- both converge to ~0.949ms, so the last-1% requires the slower full sweep.

long_sum(256,131072).note: REGRESSED on this metric -- a NOISE-FLOOR + total-wallclock artifact, NOT a real loss. 95% target = 74.3us sits in the ~70-85us small-M (M=256) noise band; seeded gen0=76.4us vs unseeded gen0=84.7us (the perf lever IS better, +11%), but seeded explores far more candidates (n_ok 78-107 vs 24-49 -> seeded total wall-clock 39-68s vs 13-36s), so 2/3 unseeded runs trip 74us via a random LFBO dip sooner. Same artifact as the prior post-fix run (was 0.479x at M=8); lifting M to 256 did not clear the noise floor. Honest long_sum claim = the gen0/Slice-1 perf win, not Slice-2.

sum(2048,16384).note: Product-A WASH kernel; still a modest 1.37x time-to-target because the seed's persistent/w16 config lands a good gen0, even though full-budget perf ties. 2/3 reached target both modes (the seeds that didn't are noise-band non-reaches).

aggregate_curriculum_headline.interpretation: Seeding shifts the convergence curve UP-AND-LEFT across the curriculum. HEADLINE: median time-to-95%-of-full-budget-perf is ~1.94x faster seeded (1.97x excluding the long_sum noise-floor artifact). The seeded search reaches a good config in roughly HALF the wall-clock; equivalently the autotune budget could be ~halved on most shapes while still hitting 95% of the full-budget optimum. The win is largest on the heavy/wide-row T2 + cross_entropy kernels (cross_entropy 6.0x, softmax_two_pass 2.4x, jsd 2.9x) where the seed injects a non-obvious persistent/capped-loop config the unseeded LFBO is slow to discover.

noise_floor_and_no_win_caveats.long_sum(256,131072): Slice-2 REGRESSES (0.31x) but this is purely a noise-floor + longer-seeded-search artifact; the seed's gen0 perf IS +11% better. Report honestly as a non-win on the time-to-target METRIC, a small win on PERF.
noise_floor_and_no_win_caveats.sum(2048,16384): Product-A wash (full-budget perf ties); modest 1.37x time-to-target from a better gen0. Honest small/no-win as predicted by the brief.
noise_floor_and_no_win_caveats.rms_norm + layer_norm: Full-budget perf ties seeded~unseeded (both converge); the value is the ~1.8-2.0x earlier time-to-target. No regression.
noise_floor_and_no_win_caveats.general: On EVERY shape the full-budget guardrail passes (seeded >= unseeded - eps). No shape regresses on perf. The two honest non-wins on the time-to-target metric (long_sum, and partly sum) are noise-floor shapes.

artifacts.verification: logs/productB_full/*.driver.log (SEED-FLAT-ENCODE PRESERVED on all 27 seeded; n_seeds=0 on all 27 unseeded)
artifacts.runner: _lab/harness/productB_full_run.sh (GROUP A on GPU2, GROUP B on GPU3)

status: WORKER-COMPLETE. All 54 runs OK (no FAILED). Seed-injection proven per kernel. HELPER_REQUEST queued: results-referee spot-reproduce the Slice-2 95% headline on cross_entropy(8192,65536) + softmax_two_pass(4096,16384), and confirm long_sum non-win is a noise-floor artifact.
